name: Factory
notes: Shared building type between Capital and Foundry Reach — base eligibility is authored on each BaseDef's buildableBuildings list, not here. Only light land vehicles — heavy tanks require Fort Irongrad/Winter Forge. Unlocks, in order: Engineer, Tonk, Ambulance, Light Tank, Transport Truck, Basekiller. Engineer unlocking at level 1 means it's available the moment a base has a Factory at all — its own infrastructure-building role is independent of Factory level after that.
